name: Cult Patrol
description: A patrol of cult fanatics guards the sanctum!

special_rules.description: Cultists fight in coordinated formations, protecting each other

ambient_description: You enter a well-lit chamber. Unlike the ancient ruins above, this area shows clear signs of habitation - bedrolls, supplies, weapon racks. A patrol of cultists notices your intrusion and moves to intercept, their formations disciplined and deadly.
victory_description: The cult patrol falls. Searching their bodies, you find orders signed by 'M.N.' - Marcus Nightshade. The orders are clear: 'Defend the sanctum at all costs. The final ritual approaches. No one must reach the Portal Chamber.'
defeat_description: The cultists overwhelm you with their coordinated tactics. You retreat back toward the stairs, hearing their leader shout, 'Inform Marcus - intruders have reached the sanctum!'
